package rulecoverage

func NegativeMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMap() string {
    ruleID := "map_delete_in_loop_vs_new_map"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` patterns"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
